mapper.select:
SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.check_in_time AS checkInTime, a.check_out_time AS checkOutTime, NULL AS managerId FROM ATTENDANCE a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
AND e.emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empName}, '%')
AND a.work_date = #{workDate}
ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, e.emp_id

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.check_in_time AS checkInTime, a.check_out_time AS checkOutTime, NULL AS managerId FROM ATTENDANCE a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.work_date = #{workDate}

SELECT l.leave_id, l.emp_id, e.emp_name, l.leave_type, l.start_date, l.end_date, l.status, l.upload_date FROM LEAVE l JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON l.emp_id = e.emp_id WHERE (#{empId} IS NULL OR e.emp_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empId}, '%')) AND (#{empName} IS NULL OR e.emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empName}, '%')) ORDER BY l.upload_date DESC

SELECT emp.emp_id AS empId, emp.emp_name AS empName, att.work_date AS workDate, att.check_in_time AS checkInTime, CASE WHEN att.check_in_time >= '09:00:00' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isLate FROM ATTENDANCE att JOIN EMPLOYEE emp ON att.emp_id = emp.emp_id WHERE att.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (emp.emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empName}, '%') OR #{empName} IS NULL) ORDER BY att.work_date;

SELECT emp.emp_name, dep.dep_name, att.attendance_date, att.work_status, att.work_time FROM attendance att JOIN employee emp ON att.emp_id = emp.emp_id JOIN department dep ON emp.dep_id = dep.dep_id WHERE 1 = 1 <if test="empId != null"> AND emp.emp_id = #{empId} </if> <if test="startDate != null"> AND att.attendance_date >= #{startDate} </if> <if test="endDate != null"> AND att.attendance_date <= #{endDate} </if>

SELECT emp_id, attendance_date AS workDate, work_hours AS workHours, night_work_hour AS nightWorkHour, holiday_work_hour AS holidayWorkHour, attendance_status AS attendanceStatus, vacation_days AS vacationDays FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND attendance_date = #{workDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (emp_id, attendance_date, work_status, work_time) VALUES (#{empId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{workStatus}, #{workTime})
